{{Quote|This is an old XT-6 model, Ulic. Their appendages make great prosthetics.|Cay Qel-Droma|audio=XT6Droid-TOTJ.flac|<ref name="TOTJ audio">[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]</ref>}}
'''XT-6 droids''' were a series of [[Service droid/Legends|service droids]] used around [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. Their [[Limb/Legends|limbs]] could be adapted to serve as [[Cybernetics/Legends|prosthetic replacements]] for injured [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. During the [[Battle of Iziz|attack]] on [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]], [[Cay Qel-Droma]] lost his left arm and replaced it with that of one such [[Droid/Legends|droid]].

{{Droid-stub}}
